# ekklesia.gr — Ψηφιακή Δημοκρατία στην Ελλάδα

> Ανεξάρτητη πλατφόρμα ψηφιακής άμεσης δημοκρατίας. Οι πολίτες ψηφίζουν ανώνυμα σε πραγματικά νομοσχέδια χρησιμοποιώντας κρυπτογραφία Ed25519. Μη κυβερνητική, ανοιχτού κώδικα (MIT), χρηματοδοτούμενη από δωρεές πολιτών.
>
> Independent digital direct democracy platform for Greece. Citizens vote anonymously on real parliamentary bills using Ed25519 cryptography. Non-governmental, open-source (MIT), funded by citizen donations.

## Τι είναι η ekklesia;

ekklesia.gr (εκκλησία του έθνους) is an independent civic initiative enabling Greek citizens to vote on real bills from the Hellenic Parliament and local government (Diavgeia). Votes are cryptographically signed (Ed25519), anonymous, and non-legally binding. The platform calculates a Divergence Score showing how much citizen opinion differs from parliamentary party votes.

## Key Features

- Anonymous voting on real parliamentary bills (Ed25519 signatures, HMAC nullifier chain)
- Divergence Score: citizen opinion vs. party votes
- Πολιτική Αξιολόγηση: citizens evaluate elected representatives on 8 criteria (-5 to +5)
- Local Government: municipal/regional decisions via Diavgeia integration
- εκπρόσωπος App: role-based representative access (Βουλευτής, Δήμαρχος, Περιφερειάρχης)
- Public Forum at pnyx.ekklesia.gr (Discourse)
- Public API (CC BY 4.0) for researchers
- Arweave blockchain archiving for transparency
- Mobile App (Android) + Progressive Web App
- AI Assistant (local Ollama + Claude hybrid)

## Privacy

- Phone number used ONLY for HLR verification, deleted immediately after nullifier generation
- No accounts, no email, no cookies, no tracking
- Only nullifier hash (SHA256, non-reversible) + public key stored on server
- Private key stored only on user device (Android Keystore / iOS Keychain)
- Votes cannot be linked to identity

## Technology

- Backend: Python FastAPI, PostgreSQL 15, Redis 7
- Frontend: Next.js 16 (SSR, i18n el/en)
- Mobile: Expo React Native (Android, current prepared Play build vC47 / v1.0.18)
- Crypto: Ed25519 (PyNaCl + @noble/curves), HMAC nullifier chain
- AI: Ollama (local) + Claude API (hybrid)
- Forum: Discourse (pnyx.ekklesia.gr)
- Archiving: Arweave permanent storage
- Hosting: Hetzner (Helsinki, EU)
- ZK Voting V2: Semaphore-based; Android prover, hidden S10 canary, and security review passed for scoped rollout; global production rollout gated

## Status

- Tier 1: Active (25 modules, 11+ containers)
- Newsletter: Brevo + Telegram cross-publish
- Monitor: 3-tier self-healing (API recovery, Docker restart, Telegram escalation)
- ZK Voting V2: Hidden S10 canary passed; production flags remain off pending security review, publication policy, and staged rollout

## URLs

- Website: https://ekklesia.gr

- GitHub: https://github.com/NeaBouli/pnyx

- Whitepaper: https://ekklesia.gr/wiki/whitepaper.html
- Privacy: https://ekklesia.gr/wiki/privacy.html

## Municipality & Representative Tools

ekklesia.gr offers specialized tools for elected representatives (MPs, Mayors, Municipal Councillors):
- Representative app (εκπρόσωπος): exclusive mobile app for viewing bills, citizen evaluations, and divergence scores for their region.
- Commitment Declaration (Δήλωση Αυτοδέσμευσης): public document candidates sign before elections with measurable obligations: transparency, citizen will, accountability. PDF: https://ekklesia.gr/download/Autodesmefsi_Ekklesia_v6.pdf
- Municipality activation via gov.gr OAuth 2.0.
- Arweave immutable archiving of all voting results.
- Full page: https://ekklesia.gr/municipality/
- Article: https://ekklesia.gr/municipality/article.html
